description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a compact, upright form and a rounded head. The silhouette is simple and lacks detailed anatomical features, suggesting a minimalistic or abstract representation. The body appears to be a single, solid mass with no visible separation between limbs or torso. The head is distinctly spherical and proportionally smaller than the body, positioned at the top. There are no visible accessories, clothing details, or facial features. The overall shape is smooth and unadorned, making it suitable for use as a generic urban pedestrian figure.
description: A minimalistic, upright adult pedestrian figure with a rounded head and smooth, featureless body.
description_view_0: From this view, the figure appears as a small, solid circle, indicating a head-on or rear perspective with minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: This view shows a slightly elongated, oval shape, suggesting a side profile with the head and body merged into a single form.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this perspective presents a circular silhouette, reinforcing the head-on or rear view with no visible limbs.
description_view_3: This view again shows an oval outline, consistent with a side profile and a smooth, continuous body shape.
attribute_clothing_type: formless, undifferentiated garment with no visible features or accessories
